sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, text STRING);
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(text, '(an)*') = true;
UPDATE test_strings SET text = 'banana' WHERE id = 1 AND regexp_matches(text, '(an)*') = true;
SELECT id, text FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(text, '.*(ana).*') = true;
